issue.body: Smoke-test the new triage → spec-from-issue → decompose-spec chain. Free to close once validated.

nodes.body:
**Triage: approved, needs-spec**

The request exercises the full lifecycle chain (triage → spec-from-issue → decompose-spec → ship-issue), which is too broad for a single tracking issue — a spec is needed to size the validation steps and produce decomposable children. Filed spec child #19.
Smoke test validated — triage→spec→decompose chain confirmed working. Closing.

issue.title: Smoke: feature-request lifecycle E2E

issue.body:
Tracks: #18

Spec for validating the full feature-request lifecycle chain end-to-end on pd-book-tools:
triage → spec-from-issue → decompose-spec → ship-issue.

Tracks: #18

Open design questions:
- Does the label transition chain (triage:approved → triage:needs-spec → spec child → decompose milestone → child with bot:ship-issue-ready) work correctly?
- Are milestone creation and child-issue linking idempotent on re-run?
- Does ship-issue still claim a bot:ship-issue-ready child issued from this chain?

Spec: docs/specs/2026-05-10-feature-request-lifecycle-e2e-smoke-design.md

labels.description: Design issue with a spec doc
labels.name: kind:spec

issue.body:
Filed from the pd-book-tools deep code/security review.

Report: `docs/research/2026-05-22-deep-code-security-review.md`
Finding: #18

Moved from mistakenly filed meta issue: ConcaveTrillion/ocr-container-meta#311

Evidence:

- `pd_book_tools/ocr/page.py:2726`
- `pd_book_tools/ocr/page.py:2728`
- `pd_book_tools/ocr/page.py:2730`
- `pd_book_tools/ocr/page.py:3557`

`Page.to_dict()` emits `provenance_live_ocr`, `provenance_saved_ocr`, and `provenance_saved` as dicts, but the pydantic schema declares nullable strings.

Impact:

- Public wire format and pydantic/codegen contract disagree.

Remediation:

- Use nullable `dict[str, Any]` schema fields or narrow runtime fields to strings.
- Add tests with dict provenance metadata.

---
This issue was filed from a read-only review. Confirm behavior with a focused failing test before implementation where practical.
issue.title: pd-book-tools: pydantic `Page` schema rejects provenance dicts emitted by `to_dict()`
